requirements_addressed: Translate ModelConfig.provider to appropriate LangChain model class or init_chat_model call
Handle local provider with custom endpoint
Handle anthropic and openai providers with default endpoints
Pass temperature through to model configuration

completion_promises.evidence: Created agents/model_factory.py with create_model(config: ModelConfig) -> BaseChatModel function. Tests TestCreateModelExists verify the function is callable and returns BaseChatModel.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Local provider creates model with custom endpoint URL
completion_promises.evidence: Local provider maps to 'openai' model_provider and passes config.endpoint as base_url kwarg to init_chat_model. Tests TestLocalProvider (3 tests) verify endpoint passthrough, openai model_provider, and model name.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Anthropic provider creates model using default Anthropic API
completion_promises.evidence: Anthropic provider maps to 'anthropic' model_provider. No base_url is passed, so init_chat_model uses Anthropic's default API. Tests TestAnthropicProvider (3 tests) verify model_provider, absence of base_url, and model name passthrough.

completion_promises.criterion_text: OpenAI provider creates model using default OpenAI API
completion_promises.evidence: OpenAI provider maps to 'openai' model_provider. No base_url is passed, so init_chat_model uses OpenAI's default API. Tests TestOpenAIProvider (3 tests) verify model_provider, absence of base_url, and model name passthrough.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Temperature is passed through to the model
completion_promises.evidence: Temperature is always included in kwargs passed to init_chat_model. Tests TestTemperaturePassthrough (3 tests) verify custom temperature (1.5), default temperature (0.7), and zero temperature (0.0) are all correctly passed through.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Invalid provider raises clear error (though Pydantic should catch this first)
completion_promises.evidence: create_model() checks _PROVIDER_MAP.get(config.provider) and raises ValueError with message 'Unsupported provider ... Supported providers: ...' when provider is unknown. Test TestInvalidProvider uses model_construct to bypass Pydantic and verifies the ValueError.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors
completion_promises.evidence: Ran 'ruff check' on both agents/model_factory.py and agents/tests/test_model_factory.py. Result: 'All checks passed!' with zero errors.
